question_en: I have a home loan of Rs 50 lakh outstanding at 8.5% linked to EBLR with 15 years remaining. My neighbour says RBI has been cutting rates throughout 2025. What is the current repo rate and by how much should my EMI have reduced? Should I ask my bank for a rate reset?
question_hi: मेरा Rs 50 लाख का होम लोन EBLR से जुड़ा हुआ है, 8.5% पर, 15 साल बाकी हैं। पड़ोसी कह रहा है कि RBI ने 2025 में कई बार रेट कम किया है। अभी रेपो रेट कितना है और मेरी EMI कितनी कम होनी चाहिए? क्या बैंक से रेट रीसेट माँगना चाहिए?
question_hinglish: Mera Rs 50 lakh ka home loan EBLR se linked hai 8.5% pe, 15 saal baki hain. Padosi bol raha hai RBI ne 2025 mein kai baar rate cut kiya hai. Abhi repo rate kitna hai aur meri EMI kitni kam honi chahiye? Bank se rate reset maangna chahiye kya?
answer: The RBI repo rate is 5.25% as of February 2026, after a series of cuts from 6.50% through 2025. The RBI MPC cut rates by 25 basis points multiple times in 2025. For floating rate home loans linked to the external benchmark lending rate (EBLR), each 25 bps cut typically reduces EMI by Rs 15-17 per lakh per month for a 20-year loan. The reverse repo rate stands at 3.35%, the MSF rate at 5.50%, and the SDF rate at 5.00%.
source: RBI Monetary Policy Committee, February 2026; RBI circular on EBLR linkage (October 2019)
question_te: నా Rs 50 లక్షల home loan EBLR కి linked, 8.5% వద్ద, 15 సంవత్సరాలు remaining. పక్కింటివారు 2025 లో RBI చాలాసార్లు rate cut చేసిందని చెప్తున్నారు. ఇప్పుడు repo rate ఎంత, నా EMI ఎంత తగ్గాలి? Bank ని rate reset అడగాలా?
question_bn: আমার Rs 50 লক্ষের home loan EBLR-এ linked, 8.5%-এ, 15 বছর বাকি। পাশের বাড়ির লোক বলছে 2025-এ RBI অনেকবার rate cut করেছে। এখন repo rate কত আর আমার EMI কতটা কমা উচিত? Bank-কে rate reset বলা উচিত কি?
question_ta: என் Rs 50 லட்சம் home loan EBLR-ல linked, 8.5%-ல, 15 வருடம் remaining. பக்கத்து வீட்டுக்காரர் 2025-ல RBI பல தடவை rate cut பண்ணிருக்குன்னு சொல்றாரு. இப்போ repo rate எவ்வளவு, என் EMI எவ்வளவு குறையணும்? Bank-கிட்ட rate reset கேக்கணுமா?

question_en: I want to open a Fixed Deposit of Rs 10 lakh for 5 years. What is the TDS rule on FD interest? Is there a way to avoid TDS?
question_hi: मैं 5 साल के लिए 10 लाख रुपये की फिक्स्ड डिपॉजिट खोलना चाहता हूं। FD ब्याज पर TDS का नियम क्या है? क्या TDS बचाने का कोई तरीका है?
question_hinglish: Main 10 lakh ka FD karna chahta hoon 5 saal ke liye. FD interest pe TDS ka kya rule hai? TDS bachane ka koi way hai?
answer: TDS on FD interest is deducted at 10% if total interest from all FDs in a bank exceeds Rs 50,000 per year (Rs 1,00,000 for senior citizens, as revised by Budget 2025 effective FY 2025-26; earlier limits were Rs 40,000 and Rs 50,000 respectively). If PAN is not provided, TDS is 20%. To avoid TDS: (1) Submit Form 15G (if total income is below taxable limit, for non-senior citizens) or Form 15H (for senior citizens with no tax liability) at the beginning of each financial year. (2) Note: Form 15G/15H only avoids TDS, not the tax itself. You must still declare FD interest in your ITR. (3) For NRIs, TDS on FD is 30% and Form 15G/15H cannot be used.
source: Section 194A, Income Tax Act; RBI FD guidelines
question_te: Rs 10 లక్షల FD 5 సంవత్సరాలకు open చేయాలనుకుంటున్నాను. FD interest మీద TDS rule ఏమిటి? TDS avoid చేయడం ఎలా?
question_bn: Rs 10 লক্ষের FD 5 বছরের জন্য করতে চাই। FD interest-এ TDS rule কী? TDS বাঁচানোর কোনো উপায় আছে?
question_ta: Rs 10 லட்சம் FD 5 வருடத்துக்கு open பண்ண நினைக்கிறேன். FD interest-க்கு TDS rule என்ன? TDS avoid பண்ற வழி இருக்கா?

question_en: I need to pay Rs 3 lakh for my daughter's college admission fee today through UPI, but the payment keeps failing saying 'transaction limit exceeded'. I already paid Rs 80,000 via UPI this morning for something else. What are the actual UPI limits and are there different limits for education payments?
question_hi: मुझे आज बेटी के कॉलेज एडमिशन फीस के लिए UPI से Rs 3 लाख भेजने हैं, लेकिन 'ट्रांजैक्शन लिमिट एक्सीडेड' आ रहा है। आज सुबह और किसी काम के लिए Rs 80,000 UPI से भेज चुका हूं। UPI की असली लिमिट क्या है और एजुकेशन पेमेंट के लिए कोई अलग लिमिट है?
question_hinglish: Beti ke college admission fee ke liye aaj UPI se Rs 3 lakh bhejna hai, lekin 'transaction limit exceeded' aa raha hai. Subah Rs 80,000 aur kisi kaam ke liye UPI se bhej chuka hoon. UPI ki actual limits kya hain aur education payment ke liye alag limit hai kya?
answer: Standard UPI person-to-person transfer limit is Rs 1 lakh per transaction. However, different limits apply for specific categories: (1) Tax payments via UPI: Rs 5 lakh; (2) IPO applications: Rs 5 lakh; (3) Hospital/education payments: Rs 5 lakh; (4) Insurance premium: Rs 5 lakh; (5) UPI Lite: Rs 500 per transaction, total limit Rs 2,000. Daily transaction limit depends on the bank but is typically Rs 1 lakh. RBI has been gradually increasing UPI limits for specific categories.
source: NPCI UPI Product Overview; RBI circulars on UPI transaction limits
question_te: నా కూతురి college admission fee కి ఈరోజు UPI ద్వారా Rs 3 లక్షలు పంపాలి, కానీ 'transaction limit exceeded' వస్తోంది. ఈ ఉదయం మరో పని కోసం Rs 80,000 UPI ద్వారా పంపాను. UPI actual limits ఏమిటి, education payments కి different limits ఉన్నాయా?
question_bn: মেয়ের college admission fee-র জন্য আজ UPI দিয়ে Rs 3 লক্ষ পাঠাতে হবে, কিন্তু 'transaction limit exceeded' আসছে। সকালে অন্য কাজে Rs 80,000 UPI দিয়ে পাঠিয়েছি। UPI-র actual limits কত আর education payment-এর জন্য আলাদা limit আছে কি?
question_ta: என் பொண்ணோட college admission fee-க்கு இன்னைக்கு UPI-ல Rs 3 லட்சம் அனுப்பணும், ஆனா 'transaction limit exceeded' வருது. காலைல வேற வேலைக்கு Rs 80,000 UPI-ல அனுப்பிட்டேன். UPI-யோட actual limits என்ன, education payment-க்கு different limits இருக்கா?

question_en: If my bank fails, how much of my deposit is insured? Does this cover Fixed Deposits and savings accounts separately?
question_hi: अगर मेरा बैंक फेल हो जाए तो मेरी जमा राशि का कितना हिस्सा बीमित है? क्या FD और बचत खाते अलग-अलग कवर होते हैं?
question_hinglish: Agar mera bank fail ho jaye toh kitna paisa safe hai? FD aur savings account alag alag cover hote hain kya?
answer: Under DICGC (Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation), each depositor is insured up to Rs 5 lakh per bank (increased from Rs 1 lakh in 2020). This Rs 5 lakh limit covers ALL deposits (savings, FD, current, recurring) in the SAME bank combined, not separately. If you have Rs 3 lakh in savings and Rs 4 lakh in FD at the same bank, only Rs 5 lakh total is covered. To protect larger amounts, spread across multiple banks. Joint accounts and individual accounts are treated as separate depositors.
source: DICGC Act, 1961 (amended 2020); RBI notification on deposit insurance
question_te: నా bank fail అయితే నా deposit ఎంత insured? FD మరియు savings account separately cover అవుతాయా?
question_bn: আমার bank fail হলে আমার deposit কত insured? FD আর savings account আলাদাভাবে cover হয় কি?
question_ta: என் bank fail ஆனா என் deposit எவ்வளவு insured? FD மற்றும் savings account separately cover ஆகுமா?

question_en: Can my bank charge a penalty for prepaying my home loan? What does RBI say about prepayment charges?
question_hi: क्या मेरा बैंक होम लोन प्रीपेमेंट पर जुर्माना लगा सकता है? RBI प्रीपेमेंट चार्ज के बारे में क्या कहता है?
question_hinglish: Kya bank home loan prepay karne pe penalty le sakta hai? RBI ka kya rule hai prepayment charges ke baare mein?
answer: RBI has mandated that banks CANNOT charge any prepayment penalty on floating rate home loans (RBI circular dated June 5, 2012, extended by subsequent circulars including May 2014; further strengthened by RBI Pre-payment Charges on Loans Directions, 2025 effective January 1, 2026). This applies to all scheduled commercial banks and housing finance companies. However, for fixed rate home loans, banks can charge prepayment penalty (typically 2-3% of outstanding). For personal loans and other floating rate retail loans, no prepayment charges apply if paid from the borrower's own sources. If refinanced from another bank, prepayment charges may apply.
source: RBI Master Direction on Interest Rate on Advances, 2016; RBI/2014-15/38
question_te: Home loan prepay చేస్తే bank penalty charge చేయవచ్చా? Prepayment charges గురించి RBI ఏం చెప్తోంది?
question_bn: Home loan prepay করলে কি bank penalty charge করতে পারে? Prepayment charges নিয়ে RBI কী বলে?
question_ta: Home loan prepay பண்ணினா bank penalty charge பண்ணலாமா? Prepayment charges பற்றி RBI என்ன சொல்லுது?

question_en: A local NBFC is offering 9.5% interest on a 3-year fixed deposit, while SBI is giving only 7%. My retirement corpus of Rs 25 lakh is in SBI FDs. Should I move it to this NBFC for higher returns? Is my money equally safe there?
question_hi: एक लोकल NBFC 3 साल की FD पर 9.5% ब्याज दे रहा है, जबकि SBI सिर्फ 7% दे रहा है। मेरा रिटायरमेंट का Rs 25 लाख SBI FD में है। क्या ज्यादा रिटर्न के लिए इसे NBFC में ले जाना चाहिए? क्या वहाँ मेरा पैसा उतना ही सुरक्षित है?
question_hinglish: Ek local NBFC 3 saal ki FD pe 9.5% interest de raha hai, jabki SBI sirf 7% de raha hai. Mera retirement ka Rs 25 lakh SBI FD mein hai. Kya zyada return ke liye NBFC mein shift karna chahiye? Kya wahan paisa utna hi safe hai?
answer: Key differences: (1) NBFCs cannot accept demand deposits (savings/current accounts). Only some NBFCs (NBFC-D) can accept fixed deposits. (2) NBFC deposits are NOT covered by DICGC insurance (the Rs 5 lakh insurance only covers bank deposits). (3) NBFCs cannot issue cheques drawn on themselves. (4) NBFCs are regulated by RBI but with lighter requirements than banks. (5) NBFCs typically offer higher FD interest rates (1-2% more than banks) because they carry higher risk. Your money in an NBFC is NOT as safe as in a bank. If an NBFC fails, you have no deposit insurance protection.
source: RBI Master Direction - NBFC, 2016; DICGC Act
question_te: ఒక local NBFC 3 సంవత్సరాల FD మీద 9.5% interest ఇస్తోంది, SBI 7% మాత్రమే ఇస్తోంది. నా retirement corpus Rs 25 లక్షలు SBI FD లో ఉంది. ఎక్కువ returns కోసం NBFC కి shift చేయాలా? అక్కడ నా డబ్బు అంతే safe గా ఉంటుందా?
question_bn: একটা local NBFC 3 বছরের FD-তে 9.5% interest দিচ্ছে, SBI মাত্র 7% দিচ্ছে। আমার retirement-এর Rs 25 লক্ষ SBI FD-তে আছে। বেশি return-এর জন্য NBFC-তে shift করা উচিত? সেখানে টাকা কি সমান safe?
question_ta: ஒரு local NBFC 3 வருட FD-க்கு 9.5% interest கொடுக்குது, SBI 7% மட்டுமே கொடுக்குது. என் retirement corpus Rs 25 லட்சம் SBI FD-ல இருக்கு. அதிக return-க்காக NBFC-க்கு shift பண்ணணுமா? அங்க என் பணம் அதே அளவு safe-ஆ இருக்குமா?

question_en: I have 200 grams of gold jewellery and urgently need Rs 8 lakh for my son's wedding expenses. I'm comparing gold loan offers from SBI and Muthoot Finance. What is the maximum I can borrow against this gold, and do banks and NBFCs have different LTV rules?
question_hi: मेरे पास 200 ग्राम सोने के गहने हैं और बेटे की शादी के खर्च के लिए तुरंत Rs 8 लाख चाहिए। SBI और मुथूट फाइनेंस दोनों से गोल्ड लोन ऑफर देख रहा हूं। इस सोने पर अधिकतम कितना कर्ज मिल सकता है, और बैंक और NBFC के LTV नियम अलग हैं?
question_hinglish: Mere paas 200 gram gold jewellery hai aur bete ki shaadi ke liye urgently Rs 8 lakh chahiye. SBI aur Muthoot Finance dono se gold loan offer dekh raha hoon. Is gold pe maximum kitna loan mil sakta hai, aur bank aur NBFC ke LTV rules alag hain kya?
answer: RBI mandates maximum LTV of 75% for gold loans from both banks and NBFCs. During COVID, RBI temporarily raised this to 90% for bank loans (August 2020), but this was reverted to 75% in March 2021. NBFCs always had 75% LTV cap. In practice, many NBFCs offer up to 75% LTV while banks may be more conservative. The gold value is assessed based on the London Bullion Market Association (LBMA) price of 22-carat gold. Auction rules apply if borrower defaults: the lender must give reasonable notice before auctioning the pledged gold.
source: RBI Master Direction on Gold Loans, 2016; RBI circular dated September 2020
question_te: నా దగ్గర 200 గ్రామ్ల gold jewellery ఉంది, కొడుకు పెళ్ళి ఖర్చుల కోసం urgently Rs 8 లక్షలు కావాలి. SBI మరియు Muthoot Finance రెండిట్లో gold loan offers చూస్తున్నాను. ఈ gold మీద maximum ఎంత loan వస్తుంది, banks మరియు NBFCs కి different LTV rules ఉన్నాయా?
question_bn: আমার কাছে 200 গ্রাম gold jewellery আছে আর ছেলের বিয়ের খরচের জন্য urgently Rs 8 লক্ষ দরকার। SBI আর Muthoot Finance দুটো থেকেই gold loan offer দেখছি। এই gold-এর ওপর maximum কত loan পাওয়া যাবে, আর bank আর NBFC-র LTV rules কি আলাদা?
question_ta: என்கிட்ட 200 gram gold jewellery இருக்கு, பையனோட கல்யாண செலவுக்கு urgently Rs 8 லட்சம் வேணும். SBI-யும் Muthoot Finance-ம் ரெண்டிலும் gold loan offer பார்க்கிறேன். இந்த gold மேல maximum எவ்வளவு loan கிடைக்கும், banks-க்கும் NBFCs-க்கும் different LTV rules இருக்கா?

question_en: I received a loan offer on a lending app. What are RBI's rules on digital lending? What should I watch out for?
question_hi: मुझे एक लेंडिंग ऐप पर लोन ऑफर मिला। डिजिटल लेंडिंग पर RBI के नियम क्या हैं? मुझे किन बातों का ध्यान रखना चाहिए?
question_hinglish: Ek lending app pe loan offer aaya hai. RBI ke digital lending rules kya hain? Kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?
answer: RBI issued comprehensive Digital Lending Guidelines in September 2022: (1) All loan disbursements and repayments must go directly to/from borrower's bank account (no pass-through via third-party apps); (2) The lending app must disclose the name of the bank/NBFC at the onset; (3) A Key Fact Statement (KFS) with effective APR must be provided upfront; (4) Cooling-off period: borrower can exit within a specified period without penalty; (5) No automatic increase of credit limit without explicit consent; (6) All data collected must be need-based with explicit consent; (7) Apps cannot access phone contacts, photos, or storage beyond what's needed. Watch out for: apps not disclosing the actual lender, hidden charges not in KFS, harassment for recovery, and apps collecting excessive phone permissions.
source: RBI Guidelines on Digital Lending, September 2022; RBI/2022-23/111
question_te: Lending app లో loan offer వచ్చింది. Digital lending మీద RBI rules ఏమిటి? ఏం జాగ్రత్తగా చూడాలి?
question_bn: Lending app-এ loan offer এসেছে। Digital lending নিয়ে RBI-র rules কী? কী কী বিষয়ে সাবধান থাকতে হবে?
question_ta: Lending app-ல loan offer வந்தது. Digital lending பற்றி RBI rules என்ன? எதெல்லாம் கவனமா பார்க்கணும்?

question_en: I need to urgently transfer Rs 5 lakh to my mother's account at another bank on a Sunday evening for a medical emergency. Which transfer method should I use — RTGS, NEFT, or IMPS? Will I be charged? How quickly will the money reach her account?
question_hi: रविवार शाम को मेरी माँ के दूसरे बैंक के खाते में मेडिकल इमरजेंसी के लिए तुरंत Rs 5 लाख भेजने हैं। कौन सा ट्रांसफर तरीका इस्तेमाल करूं — RTGS, NEFT, या IMPS? क्या चार्ज लगेगा? पैसा कितनी जल्दी पहुंचेगा?
question_hinglish: Sunday evening ko maa ke doosre bank ke account mein medical emergency ke liye urgently Rs 5 lakh bhejna hai. Kaun sa transfer method use karun — RTGS, NEFT, ya IMPS? Charge lagega kya? Paisa kitni jaldi pahunchega?
answer: NEFT: Batch-based settlement (every half hour), no minimum amount, maximum Rs 50 lakh via online banking. Available 24x7. RTGS: Real-time gross settlement, minimum Rs 2 lakh, no maximum limit. Available 24x7 since December 2020. IMPS: Immediate Payment Service, maximum Rs 5 lakh, available 24x7 including holidays. Regarding charges: RBI mandated that NEFT and RTGS transactions initiated through online banking are FREE (since January 2020). Banks cannot charge customers for online NEFT/RTGS. For branch-initiated transfers, banks may charge nominal fees. IMPS charges vary by bank but are typically Rs 2.50 to Rs 25 depending on amount.
source: RBI Payment Systems - RTGS/NEFT/IMPS operating guidelines; RBI circular on waiver of charges (January 2020)
question_te: ఆదివారం సాయంత్రం medical emergency కోసం అమ్మ account కి వేరే bank లో urgently Rs 5 లక్షలు transfer చేయాలి. ఏ transfer method వాడాలి — RTGS, NEFT, లేదా IMPS? Charge ఉంటుందా? Money ఎంత quickly reach అవుతుంది?
question_bn: রবিবার সন্ধ্যায় medical emergency-র জন্য মায়ের অন্য bank-এর account-এ urgently Rs 5 লক্ষ পাঠাতে হবে। কোন transfer method ব্যবহার করব — RTGS, NEFT, নাকি IMPS? Charge লাগবে কি? টাকা কত তাড়াতাড়ি পৌঁছাবে?
question_ta: ஞாயிற்றுக்கிழமை மாலை medical emergency-க்கு அம்மாவோட வேற bank account-க்கு urgently Rs 5 லட்சம் transfer பண்ணணும். எந்த transfer method use பண்றது — RTGS, NEFT, இல்ல IMPS? Charge வருமா? Money எவ்வளவு quickly reach ஆகும்?

question_en: I am a small farmer wanting a crop loan. Am I eligible for any priority sector lending benefit? What interest rate can I expect?
question_hi: मैं एक छोटा किसान हूं और फसल ऋण चाहता हूं। क्या मुझे प्राथमिकता क्षेत्र ऋण का कोई लाभ मिल सकता है? ब्याज दर क्या होगी?
question_hinglish: Main chhota farmer hoon, crop loan chahiye. Priority sector lending ka koi benefit milega? Interest rate kya hoga?
answer: Yes, agriculture is a priority sector under RBI's Priority Sector Lending (PSL) norms. Banks must lend 18% of their Adjusted Net Bank Credit to agriculture (within the overall 40% PSL target). For crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh, the Government of India provides interest subvention: effective interest rate is 7% per annum, with an additional 3% subvention for timely repayment, making the effective rate just 4% for prompt repayers. This is one of the cheapest loans available in India. Kisan Credit Card (KCC) is the primary mechanism for availing crop loans with this benefit.
source: RBI Master Direction on Priority Sector Lending, 2020; Government Interest Subvention Scheme for farmers
question_te: నేను చిన్న రైతుని, crop loan కావాలి. Priority sector lending benefit కి eligible అవుతానా? Interest rate ఎంత ఉంటుంది?
question_bn: আমি ছোট কৃষক, crop loan চাই। Priority sector lending benefit-এর জন্য eligible কি? Interest rate কত হবে?
question_ta: நான் சின்ன விவசாயி, crop loan வேணும். Priority sector lending benefit-க்கு eligible ஆவேனா? Interest rate எவ்வளவு இருக்கும்?

question_en: My bank offers home loan linked to MCLR and another linked to EBLR (repo rate). Which is better for me as a borrower? Should I switch from MCLR to EBLR?
question_hi: मेरा बैंक MCLR से जुड़ा होम लोन और EBLR (रेपो रेट) से जुड़ा होम लोन दोनों ऑफर करता है। उधारकर्ता के रूप में मेरे लिए कौन सा बेहतर है? क्या मुझे MCLR से EBLR में स्विच करना चाहिए?
question_hinglish: Bank MCLR wala home loan bhi de raha hai aur EBLR (repo rate) wala bhi. Borrower ke liye konsa better hai? MCLR se EBLR mein switch karna chahiye kya?
answer: EBLR (External Benchmark Lending Rate) is generally better for borrowers than MCLR (Marginal Cost of Funds-based Lending Rate). Key reasons: (1) EBLR is directly linked to RBI repo rate (currently 5.25% as of Feb 2026), so rate cuts are transmitted immediately - banks must reset EBLR loans at least every 3 months. (2) MCLR is an internal benchmark set by banks, and banks historically delayed passing on rate cuts - MCLR resets happen every 6-12 months. (3) Since October 2019, RBI mandated all new floating rate retail loans must be linked to an external benchmark (repo rate, T-bill rate, etc.). (4) Typical EBLR home loan rate = repo rate + spread (e.g., 5.25% + 2.50% = 7.75%). MCLR loans may still carry rates of 8.5-9.0%. (5) Switching from MCLR to EBLR: banks can charge a one-time switching fee (typically Rs 5,000-10,000). Calculate your savings over the remaining tenure before switching. For a Rs 50 lakh loan with 15 years remaining, even a 0.50% rate difference saves approximately Rs 4.5 lakh in total interest.
source: RBI circular on External Benchmark Lending Rate (RBI/2019-20/53), October 2019; RBI Master Direction on Interest Rate on Advances, 2016
question_te: Bank MCLR linked home loan మరియు EBLR (repo rate) linked loan రెండూ offer చేస్తోంది. Borrower గా నాకు ఏది better? MCLR నుండి EBLR కి switch అవ్వాలా?
question_bn: Bank MCLR linked home loan আর EBLR (repo rate) linked loan দুটোই offer করছে। Borrower হিসেবে কোনটা better? MCLR থেকে EBLR-এ switch করা উচিত কি?
question_ta: Bank MCLR linked home loan-ம் EBLR (repo rate) linked loan-ம் ரெண்டும் offer பண்றாங்க. Borrower-ஆ எனக்கு எது better? MCLR-லிருந்து EBLR-க்கு switch பண்ணணுமா?

question_en: I want to send money abroad for my child's education. What is the RBI Liberalised Remittance Scheme (LRS) limit? What are the TCS charges I need to pay?
question_hi: मैं अपने बच्चे की शिक्षा के लिए विदेश पैसा भेजना चाहता हूं। RBI लिबरलाइज्ड रेमिटेंस स्कीम (LRS) की सीमा क्या है? TCS चार्ज कितना देना होगा?
question_hinglish: Bacche ki education ke liye abroad paisa bhejna hai. RBI ka LRS limit kya hai? TCS kitna lagega?
answer: Under RBI's Liberalised Remittance Scheme (LRS), resident individuals can remit up to USD 250,000 per financial year (April to March) for permitted current and capital account transactions. This covers education, medical treatment, travel, gifts, investment in shares/property abroad, and maintenance of relatives. TCS (Tax Collected at Source) rules as per Finance Act (updated with Budget 2025 changes): (1) No TCS on remittances up to Rs 7 lakh per financial year for any purpose (Rs 10 lakh from April 2025 per Budget 2025). (2) For education funded by education loan above the threshold: TCS removed entirely from April 2025 per Budget 2025. (3) For education funded from own sources: TCS at 5% above Rs 7 lakh. (3) For overseas tour packages: TCS at 20% (with no Rs 7 lakh threshold since October 2023). (4) For all other LRS purposes (investment, gifts, etc.): TCS at 20% above Rs 7 lakh. Important: TCS is NOT an additional tax - it is adjustable against your income tax liability when filing ITR. You can claim refund if TCS exceeds your tax due. The USD 250,000 limit is per person per year, so a family of 4 can collectively remit up to USD 1 million.
source: RBI Master Direction on LRS (updated 2024); Section 206C(1G) of Income Tax Act; FEMA (Current Account Transactions) Rules
question_te: Child education కోసం abroad కి money send చేయాలి. RBI LRS limit ఎంత? TCS charges ఎంత pay చేయాలి?
question_bn: Bacchar education-এর জন্য abroad-এ টাকা পাঠাতে চাই। RBI LRS limit কত? TCS charges কত দিতে হবে?
question_ta: Kuzhanthai education-க்கு abroad-க்கு panam anuppa venum. RBI LRS limit evvalavu? TCS charges evvalavu kattanum?

question_en: My bank is threatening to seize my property because I defaulted on a loan. Can they do this without going to court? What is the SARFAESI Act?
question_hi: मेरा बैंक लोन डिफॉल्ट होने पर मेरी प्रॉपर्टी जब्त करने की धमकी दे रहा है। क्या वे बिना कोर्ट जाए ऐसा कर सकते हैं? SARFAESI Act क्या है?
question_hinglish: Bank bol raha hai loan default hone pe property seize kar lenge. Bina court ke kar sakte hain kya? SARFAESI Act kya hai?
answer: Yes, under the SARFAESI Act, 2002 (Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act), banks and financial institutions CAN seize and sell secured assets WITHOUT court intervention. Key provisions: (1) Applies when loan is classified as NPA (Non-Performing Asset) - typically after 90 days of non-payment. (2) Bank must issue a 60-day notice under Section 13(2) demanding repayment. (3) If borrower fails to repay within 60 days, bank can take possession of the secured asset under Section 13(4). (4) Bank must give 30-day public notice before auction of the property. (5) Borrower can file appeal with DRT (Debt Recovery Tribunal) within 45 days of bank action, but must deposit 50% of the claimed amount (reduced from pre-deposit requirement by amendment). (6) SARFAESI does NOT apply to: loans below Rs 1 lakh, agricultural land, and cases where the property value is less than 20% of the loan outstanding. (7) Co-operative banks were excluded earlier but included after 2020 amendment. Borrowers have the right to get a fair valuation and the sale must be transparent.
source: SARFAESI Act, 2002; Section 13 provisions; Supreme Court rulings on SARFAESI; RBI NPA classification norms
question_te: Loan default అయితే bank property seize చేస్తామని threaten చేస్తోంది. Court లేకుండా చేయగలరా? SARFAESI Act ఏమిటి?
question_bn: Loan default হলে bank property seize করবে বলে threatening করছে। Court ছাড়া করতে পারে কি? SARFAESI Act কী?
question_ta: Loan default ஆனா bank property seize பண்றோம்னு threaten பண்றாங்க. Court இல்லாம பண்ண முடியுமா? SARFAESI Act என்ன?

question_en: My bank is not resolving my complaint about wrongful charges. How do I file a complaint with the RBI Banking Ombudsman? What is the RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme?
question_hi: मेरा बैंक गलत चार्ज की शिकायत का समाधान नहीं कर रहा। RBI बैंकिंग लोकपाल में शिकायत कैसे करें? RBI एकीकृत लोकपाल योजना क्या है?
question_hinglish: Bank galat charges ki complaint solve nahi kar raha. RBI Banking Ombudsman mein complaint kaise karein? RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme kya hai?
answer: RBI launched the Integrated Ombudsman Scheme (RB-IOS) on November 12, 2021, replacing three separate ombudsman schemes (Banking, NBFC, and Digital Transactions). How to file a complaint: (1) FIRST complain to your bank and wait 30 days for resolution. If unsatisfied or no response, proceed to RBI Ombudsman. (2) File online at https://cms.rbi.org.in (Complaint Management System) - this is the easiest method. (3) You can also send a physical complaint to the Centralised Receipt and Processing Centre (CRPC) in Chandigarh. (4) The complaint is FREE - no lawyer or fees needed. (5) Ombudsman can award compensation up to Rs 20 lakh (Rs 1 crore for deficiency in service related to digital transactions in some cases). (6) Grounds for complaint include: wrongful charges, non-adherence to fair practices code, delayed credit/payment, ATM issues, non-observance of RBI guidelines, mis-selling, and more. (7) The ombudsman must resolve within 30 days (extendable by 30 more days). (8) If unsatisfied with ombudsman decision, you can appeal to the Appellate Authority (Executive Director of RBI) within 30 days.
source: RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021; RBI CMS Portal (cms.rbi.org.in); RBI circular dated November 12, 2021
question_te: Bank wrongful charges complaint resolve చేయడం లేదు. RBI Banking Ombudsman కి complaint ఎలా file చేయాలి? RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme ఏమిటి?
question_bn: Bank wrongful charges-এর complaint resolve করছে না। RBI Banking Ombudsman-এ complaint কীভাবে file করব? RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme কী?
question_ta: Bank wrongful charges complaint resolve பண்ணல. RBI Banking Ombudsman-ல complaint எப்படி file பண்றது? RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme என்ன?

question_en: My savings account has been inactive for 3 years. Has it become dormant or inoperative? How do I reactivate it? Can the bank charge me for reactivation?
question_hi: मेरा बचत खाता 3 साल से निष्क्रिय है। क्या यह निष्क्रिय/इनऑपरेटिव हो गया है? इसे फिर से कैसे चालू करें? क्या बैंक रीएक्टिवेशन के लिए चार्ज कर सकता है?
question_hinglish: Mera savings account 3 saal se inactive hai. Dormant ya inoperative ho gaya kya? Reactivate kaise karein? Bank reactivation ka charge le sakta hai kya?
answer: RBI classifies accounts based on inactivity: (1) No customer-initiated transactions for 2 years = account becomes 'inoperative' or 'dormant'. Credits like interest, dividends, or government payments do NOT count as customer transactions. (2) After 10 years of being inoperative, unclaimed deposits are transferred to RBI's DEAF (Depositor Education and Awareness Fund). Reactivation process: (1) Visit the branch with a written request. (2) Submit valid KYC documents (Aadhaar, PAN, address proof). (3) Bank may require in-person verification. (4) RBI has mandated that banks CANNOT charge for reactivation of inoperative accounts (RBI circular 2014). If a bank charges you, it is violating RBI guidelines. (5) Your balance earns interest even while the account is dormant. (6) Important: dormant accounts cannot process debit transactions (withdrawals, transfers) but can still receive credits. (7) To prevent dormancy, make at least one customer-initiated transaction (ATM withdrawal, online transfer, cheque) every 24 months. (8) You can search for unclaimed deposits on the RBI UDGAM portal (udgam.rbi.org.in).
source: RBI Master Circular on Customer Service, 2015; RBI circular on Inoperative Accounts (RBI/2014-15/68); DEAF provisions under Banking Regulation Act; RBI UDGAM portal
question_te: నా savings account 3 సంవత్సరాలుగా inactive గా ఉంది. Dormant లేదా inoperative అయిందా? Reactivate ఎలా చేయాలి? Bank reactivation కి charge చేయగలరా?
question_bn: আমার savings account 3 বছর ধরে inactive। Dormant বা inoperative হয়ে গেছে কি? Reactivate কীভাবে করব? Bank reactivation-এর জন্য charge নিতে পারে কি?
question_ta: என் savings account 3 வருடமா inactive-ஆ இருக்கு. Dormant அல்லது inoperative ஆயிடுச்சா? Reactivate எப்படி பண்றது? Bank reactivation-க்கு charge பண்ணலாமா?

question_en: I want to take an education loan for studying abroad. What are the current interest rates, collateral requirements, and moratorium period rules in India?
question_hi: मैं विदेश में पढ़ाई के लिए एजुकेशन लोन लेना चाहता हूं। भारत में वर्तमान ब्याज दर, कोलैटरल आवश्यकताएं, और मोरेटोरियम अवधि के नियम क्या हैं?
question_hinglish: Abroad study ke liye education loan lena hai. Current interest rate, collateral requirement, aur moratorium period ke rules kya hain India mein?
answer: Education loan rules in India (2025-26): (1) Interest rates: Public sector banks typically charge 8.5%-10.5% (linked to EBLR/MCLR). SBI charges around 8.50% for loans up to Rs 7.5 lakh. Private banks may charge 10%-13%. Government's Vidyalakshmi portal lists bank-wise rates. (2) Collateral: Loans up to Rs 7.5 lakh generally require NO collateral (only co-borrower/parent as guarantor). Loans above Rs 7.5 lakh typically require collateral (property, FD, etc.). Some banks have raised the collateral-free limit to Rs 10 lakh. (3) Moratorium period: Repayment begins after course completion + 6 months (or 1 year after getting a job, whichever is earlier). During moratorium, simple interest accrues but no EMI is required. However, paying interest during the moratorium significantly reduces total cost. (4) Tax benefit: Interest on education loan is fully deductible under Section 80E for 8 years from the start of repayment (no cap on deduction amount). (5) Government schemes: Interest subsidy under Central Sector Interest Subsidy (CSIS) scheme for economically weaker sections (family income below Rs 4.5 lakh/year) covers full interest during moratorium. (6) Maximum loan amount varies: Rs 10-20 lakh for studies in India, Rs 20-40 lakh for abroad (bank-dependent, some offer up to Rs 1.5 crore for premier institutions).
source: IBA (Indian Banks' Association) Model Education Loan Scheme, 2024; RBI guidelines on education loans; Section 80E, Income Tax Act; Vidyalakshmi Portal (vidyalakshmi.co.in)
question_te: Abroad study కోసం education loan తీసుకోవాలి. Current interest rates, collateral requirements, moratorium period rules ఏమిటి?
question_bn: Abroad study-র জন্য education loan নিতে চাই। Current interest rates, collateral requirements, moratorium period rules কী?
question_ta: Abroad study-க்கு education loan எடுக்கணும். Current interest rates, collateral requirements, moratorium period rules என்ன?

question_en: I applied for a personal loan at two banks last month and both rejected me. When I asked why, they said my CIBIL score is 620. I have never missed any EMI payment. How does CIBIL scoring work in India, what could have gone wrong, and how can I improve it to get approved?
question_hi: पिछले महीने दो बैंकों में पर्सनल लोन के लिए अप्लाई किया और दोनों ने रिजेक्ट कर दिया। पूछा तो बोले CIBIL स्कोर 620 है। मैंने कभी कोई EMI मिस नहीं की। CIBIL स्कोरिंग कैसे काम करता है, क्या गलत हुआ होगा, और स्कोर कैसे सुधारूँ ताकि लोन मिल सके?
question_hinglish: Pichle mahine do banks mein personal loan ke liye apply kiya aur dono ne reject kar diya. Pucha toh bole CIBIL score 620 hai. Maine kabhi koi EMI miss nahi ki. CIBIL scoring kaise kaam karta hai, kya galat hua hoga, aur score kaise improve karun taaki loan mil sake?
answer: CIBIL (Credit Information Bureau India Limited, now TransUnion CIBIL) score is a 3-digit number ranging from 300-900 that represents your creditworthiness. India has 4 RBI-licensed credit bureaus: TransUnion CIBIL, Experian, Equifax, and CRIF High Mark. How it works: (1) Score above 750: Excellent - best loan rates and easy approval. (2) Score 700-749: Good - most loans approved. (3) Score 650-699: Fair - approval possible but higher interest rates. (4) Below 650: Poor - difficult to get loans, may need secured credit cards. (5) Score of -1 or 0: No credit history (common for first-time borrowers). Factors affecting score: Payment history (35%), credit utilization (30%), credit age (15%), credit mix (10%), hard inquiries (10%). Key India-specific rules: (1) RBI mandated that all credit bureaus must provide ONE free credit report per year to every individual (since 2017). (2) You can get your free CIBIL report at cibil.com. (3) If you find errors, you can raise a dispute directly with the credit bureau - they must resolve within 30 days. (4) Banks cannot reject a loan solely based on CIBIL score if other parameters are strong. (5) Settling a loan for less than full amount (one-time settlement/OTS) severely damages your CIBIL score and the 'settled' tag stays for 7 years.
source: Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005; RBI circular on free credit reports (2017); TransUnion CIBIL guidelines
question_te: గత నెల రెండు banks లో personal loan కి apply చేశాను, రెండూ reject చేశాయి. అడిగితే CIBIL score 620 అని చెప్పారు. నేను ఎప్పుడూ EMI miss చేయలేదు. CIBIL scoring ఎలా work చేస్తుంది, ఏం తప్పు జరిగి ఉంటుంది, loan approve అవ్వడానికి score ఎలా improve చేయాలి?
question_bn: গত মাসে দুটো bank-এ personal loan-এর জন্য apply করেছিলাম, দুটোই reject করেছে। জিজ্ঞেস করলে বলল CIBIL score 620। আমি কোনোদিন কোনো EMI miss করিনি। CIBIL scoring কীভাবে কাজ করে, কী ভুল হয়েছে, আর loan approve হওয়ার জন্য score কীভাবে improve করব?
question_ta: கடந்த மாசம் ரெண்டு banks-ல personal loan-க்கு apply பண்ணினேன், ரெண்டும் reject பண்ணிட்டாங்க. கேட்டா CIBIL score 620-ன்னு சொன்னாங்க. நான் எப்பவும் EMI miss பண்ணலை. CIBIL scoring எப்படி work ஆகுது, என்ன தப்பு நடந்திருக்கும், loan approve ஆக score எப்படி improve பண்றது?

question_en: I want to start a Recurring Deposit (RD) for Rs 10,000 per month. What are the rules for premature withdrawal? What penalty will I face?
question_hi: मैं Rs 10,000 प्रति माह की आवर्ती जमा (RD) शुरू करना चाहता हूं। समय से पहले निकासी के नियम क्या हैं? कितना जुर्माना लगेगा?
question_hinglish: Rs 10,000 per month ka RD start karna chahta hoon. Premature withdrawal ke rules kya hain? Kitna penalty lagega?
answer: Recurring Deposit (RD) rules in India (2025-26): (1) Premature withdrawal: Most banks allow premature closure of RD, but the interest rate applied is reduced. The bank pays interest at the rate applicable for the period the RD was held (not the contracted rate), minus a penalty of 0.5%-1% depending on the bank. For example, if you opened a 5-year RD at 7% but close after 2 years, you get the 2-year FD rate (say 6.5%) minus 1% penalty = 5.5% effective rate. (2) Missed installments: If you miss an installment, most banks charge a penalty of Rs 1-2 per Rs 100 of installment per month of default. If 3-6 consecutive installments are missed, the RD may be automatically closed. (3) Loan against RD: Instead of premature withdrawal, you can take a loan against RD up to 80-90% of the deposited amount at an interest rate typically 1-2% above the RD rate. This avoids the premature withdrawal penalty. (4) TDS: Same rules as FD - TDS at 10% if interest exceeds Rs 50,000 per year (Rs 1,00,000 for senior citizens, as revised by Budget 2025). Form 15G/15H applicable. (5) Post office RD: 5-year tenure, current rate around 6.7%, premature withdrawal allowed after 3 years with a penalty. Partial withdrawal not allowed. (6) Minimum RD amount is typically Rs 100-500 per month at most banks.
source: RBI Master Direction on Interest Rate on Deposits, 2016; Individual bank RD terms and conditions; Post Office RD rules under Government Small Savings Scheme
question_te: Rs 10,000 per month RD start చేయాలనుకుంటున్నాను. Premature withdrawal rules ఏమిటి? Penalty ఎంత ఉంటుంది?
question_bn: Rs 10,000 per month RD শুরু করতে চাই। Premature withdrawal-এর rules কী? Penalty কত হবে?
question_ta: Rs 10,000 per month RD start பண்ணணும். Premature withdrawal rules என்ன? Penalty எவ்வளவு இருக்கும்?

question_en: Is there a limit on how much cash I can deposit or withdraw from my bank account? What happens if I deposit more than Rs 10 lakh in cash?
question_hi: बैंक खाते में कैश जमा या निकासी की कोई सीमा है क्या? अगर मैं Rs 10 लाख से ज्यादा कैश जमा करूं तो क्या होगा?
question_hinglish: Bank account mein cash deposit ya withdrawal ki koi limit hai kya? Rs 10 lakh se zyada cash deposit karein toh kya hoga?
answer: Cash transaction reporting and limits in India: (1) Rs 10 lakh threshold: Banks must report cash deposits/withdrawals aggregating Rs 10 lakh or more in a financial year in savings accounts to the Income Tax Department via Statement of Financial Transactions (SFT/Form 61A). For current accounts, the threshold is Rs 50 lakh per year. (2) Rs 2 lakh single transaction rule: Under Section 269ST of Income Tax Act, receiving Rs 2 lakh or more in CASH in a single transaction or from one person in a day is PROHIBITED (penalty equal to the amount received). This does not apply to bank deposits/withdrawals but to person-to-person cash dealings. (3) PAN requirement: PAN is mandatory for cash deposits of Rs 50,000 or more in a single day. Without PAN, you must submit Form 60. (4) Rs 20 lakh cash deposit/withdrawal: From April 2022, banks report to FIU-IND (Financial Intelligence Unit) for cash transactions of Rs 10 lakh+ in a month. (5) No legal upper limit exists on how much cash you can deposit in your own bank account, BUT the income must be explained to the tax authorities. Unexplained cash deposits can attract 60% tax + 25% surcharge + cess under Section 68/69A. (6) Form 26AS/AIS now shows all high-value transactions reported by banks, making it easy for IT department to track.
source: Section 114B of Income Tax Rules (SFT/Form 61A); Section 269ST of Income Tax Act; PMLA (Prevention of Money Laundering Act) rules; FIU-IND reporting guidelines
question_te: Bank account లో cash deposit లేదా withdrawal కి limit ఉందా? Rs 10 లక్షలకు పైగా cash deposit చేస్తే ఏం జరుగుతుంది?
question_bn: Bank account-এ cash deposit বা withdrawal-এর কোনো limit আছে কি? Rs 10 লক্ষের বেশি cash deposit করলে কী হবে?
question_ta: Bank account-ல cash deposit அல்லது withdrawal-க்கு limit இருக்கா? Rs 10 லட்சத்துக்கு மேல cash deposit பண்ணினா என்ன ஆகும்?

question_en: My online shopping site says my saved card details have been replaced with a 'token'. What is RBI's card tokenization rule? Is it safe? Do I need to save my card again?
question_hi: मेरी ऑनलाइन शॉपिंग साइट कह रही है कि मेरे सेव किए गए कार्ड डिटेल्स को 'टोकन' से बदल दिया गया है। RBI का कार्ड टोकनाइज़ेशन नियम क्या है? क्या यह सुरक्षित है? क्या मुझे अपना कार्ड दोबारा सेव करना होगा?
question_hinglish: Online shopping site bol rahi hai saved card details ko 'token' se replace kar diya. RBI ka card tokenization rule kya hai? Safe hai kya? Card dobara save karna padega kya?
answer: RBI mandated card-on-file (CoF) tokenization effective October 1, 2022. Key rules: (1) No merchant, payment aggregator, or payment gateway can store actual card details (card number, expiry, CVV) on their servers. (2) Instead, card details are replaced with a unique 'token' - a random alphanumeric code specific to that card + merchant + device combination. (3) Tokenization is done by the card network (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay) and is more secure because even if a merchant is hacked, your actual card data is not exposed. (4) You DO need to re-save/re-tokenize your card on each merchant site - this is a one-time process where you consent to tokenization. The last 4 digits and card issuer name are shown for identification. (5) You can de-tokenize (remove saved token) at any time from the merchant's app/site. (6) Tokenization is FREE - no charge to the customer. (7) Recurring/subscription payments: For auto-debits up to Rs 15,000, additional factor authentication (OTP) is not needed after the first registration. Above Rs 15,000, pre-debit notification and OTP are required. (8) Card-on-file tokenization applies to domestic transactions. International transactions follow different rules. (9) This was done after major data breaches at merchants like Juspay (2020) and Mobikwik (2021) exposed millions of Indian card details.
source: RBI circular on Card-on-File Tokenization (RBI/2021-22/125), September 2021; RBI circular on recurring e-mandates (2020); RBI guidelines on Payment Aggregators
question_te: Online shopping site saved card details 'token' తో replace అయ్యాయని చెప్తోంది. RBI card tokenization rule ఏమిటి? Safe గా ఉంటుందా? Card మళ్ళీ save చేయాలా?
question_bn: Online shopping site বলছে saved card details 'token' দিয়ে replace হয়ে গেছে। RBI card tokenization rule কী? Safe কি? Card আবার save করতে হবে কি?
question_ta: Online shopping site saved card details 'token'-ஆ replace ஆயிடுச்சுன்னு சொல்லுது. RBI card tokenization rule என்ன? Safe-ஆ இருக்குமா? Card மறுபடி save பண்ணணுமா?
